subject: [HOLMES] Alter table to align with Ves 7.1 changes in Holmes-ms
commit_message:
[HOLMES] Alter table to align with Ves 7.1 changes in Holmes-ms

Table altered in Holmes-ms, same to be aligned in helm chart

Issue-ID: HOLMES-308
Signed-off-by: Venkata Molluru <venkatamuralimohanreddy.molluru@techmahindra.com>
Change-Id: I6a2a93fbcf232639c9f3d2853a91011a0f70673f

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4262/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4262/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4262/ )
